rulings.Case Title: TOM PISANI VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, Arpil 7, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJDICTION. Motion Granted. Defendant shifted the burden and plaintiff fails to create a triable issue of fact regarding causation. Plaintiff's evidence is conjectural and Court strikes Ay declaration as lacking foundation. =(302CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DEBORAH DELMARS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A; Declarationof Mark R. Nivinskus; Proposed Order; Proposed First Amended Summons & Complaint Attached
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, Arpil 7, 2009, line 4, PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint. Motion denied. Defendant Progressive Choice dilatory in seeking amendment and Pereira prejudiced, since discovery is closed and trial date is set. =(302CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDRE PUPO GOUVEA et al VS. CLARINDO GOMES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Alexandre Pupo Gouvea And Paulo Henrique Rosetto'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, Arpil 7, 2009, line 12, Plaintiffs Alexandre Pupo Gouvea and Paulo Henrique Rosetto's Order to Show Cause regarding Preliminary Injunction (per ex parte Order of 3/23/09). Motion for preliminary injunction is denied. Plaintiffs have not shown that they are likely to prevail on the merits; no showing of imminent, irreparable harm. =(302CWW/VC)
